---
title: "Contact & Collaborate"
---

I am always glad to hear from researchers, clinicians, and students interested in neuroscience, machine learning, or neurotechnology education. Please reach out by email or connect with me on LinkedIn.

- **Email:** [jana.mahmoud@mail.utoronto.ca](mailto:jana.mahmoud@mail.utoronto.ca)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/jana0511](https://linkedin.com/in/jana0511)

If you are affiliated with the Krembil Brain Institute, NeurotechUofT, or a related research or clinical program and would like to collaborate, feel free to get in touch directly.

I would also love to mentor or be mentored, and I am open to freelance work in tutoring, coaching, advising, web development, marketing, research support, manuscript editing, and peer reviewing.
